title: gaultheria chiriquensis
intro: Gaultheria chiriquensis, also known as the Chiriqui Gaultheria or mountain tea, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical mountains of Central America, particularly in Panama and Costa Rica. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues. Gaultheria chiriquensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
